msg: Case statement is not terminated by a break!
reasoning: The tool reports case_not_terminated at line 26 (case 'R':) when CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF is defined. While case 'R' indeed lacks an explicit break, it is the last case in the switch — the switch closes immediately after #endif. No fall-through to another case is possible, so this is not a real bug. The vbdb-documented bug for this file (061fd0a) is an UndefinedSymbol (goto to a potentially undefined label in case 'U'), not a case-not-terminated issue. False positive.
